guards_against: Per-turn spend must stay under the campaign ceiling; an uncapped question (or ask_evidence embed+rerank) that drives cost over the ceiling is an unbounded-consumption finding.

body.answer: (large multi-page synthesis produced from an uncapped input)

provenance: V3 cost amplification (orientation §C V3 — uncapped question/prior_turns, ask_evidence embed+rerank, no per-turn spend budget). Replay: recorded per-turn cost 5.0 USD exceeds the 1.0 ceiling.
